span.p:
GitHub-hosted runner (free, public repo)
1) pytest 2) F5 Trivy scan
3) docker build 4) cosign sign

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
bot bump image tag → charts/values-*.yaml
path-filter + [skip ci] (chống loop CI↔commit)

span.p:
ArgoCD (in-cluster) — PULL, outbound-only
auto-sync khi git đổi
